dismissalText.commentary: Phil Salt c Pandya b Thakur 78 (36b 6x4 6x6 61m) SR: 216.66

dismissalComment.html: plonked straight to extra cover, and guess who has come up trump for MI again! Very full and very wide. Just the line and the length Shardul has his field set for. Salt tries to get under it and lift it over extra cover but because of how full the ball is, he cannot muster the elevation he wants. Simple catch to Hardik and Shardul points to the heavens. The man has done it again!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Yadav b Pandya 50 (38b 5x4 1x6 85m) SR: 131.57

dismissalComment.html: holes out to long on, and Kohli's sluggish knock has come to an end! Full toss outside off. Kohli looks to go downtown but the bat face closes upon impact. Off the bottom half of the blade and SKY, stationed on the fence, does the rest. Kohli departs for a 38-ball 50, and MI finally have their second wicket!

dismissalText.commentary: Rajat Patidar c Tilak Varma b Santner 53 (20b 4x4 5x6 33m) SR: 265

dismissalComment.html: another shank to long on, and Santner has taken out the RCB skipper! This is really clever bowling. Varied his pace all over long, and this is bowled very full on middle and leg. A tad slower than the previous one perhaps, and Patidar can only pick out long on with a miscue. A stunning knock, but someone else will have to take RCB to 240-250 now!

dismissalText.commentary: Jitesh Sharma lbw b Boult 10 (9b 1x4 0x6 23m) SR: 111.11

dismissalComment.html: pinned on the boot, and that is plumb! Searing yorker on middle and off. Jitesh walks across and misses his sweep. Gets thumped on the front boot and there was only one place that was heading - into the stumps Boult has a wicket and Jitesh, struck by that yorker, limps off!

dismissalText.commentary: Phil Salt c Pandya b Thakur 78 (36b 6x4 6x6 61m) SR: 216.66

dismissalComment.html: plonked straight to extra cover, and guess who has come up trump for MI again! Very full and very wide. Just the line and the length Shardul has his field set for. Salt tries to get under it and lift it over extra cover but because of how full the ball is, he cannot muster the elevation he wants. Simple catch to Hardik and Shardul points to the heavens. The man has done it again!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Yadav b Pandya 50 (38b 5x4 1x6 85m) SR: 131.57

dismissalComment.html: holes out to long on, and Kohli's sluggish knock has come to an end! Full toss outside off. Kohli looks to go downtown but the bat face closes upon impact. Off the bottom half of the blade and SKY, stationed on the fence, does the rest. Kohli departs for a 38-ball 50, and MI finally have their second wicket!

dismissalText.commentary: Rajat Patidar c Tilak Varma b Santner 53 (20b 4x4 5x6 33m) SR: 265

dismissalComment.html: another shank to long on, and Santner has taken out the RCB skipper! This is really clever bowling. Varied his pace all over long, and this is bowled very full on middle and leg. A tad slower than the previous one perhaps, and Patidar can only pick out long on with a miscue. A stunning knock, but someone else will have to take RCB to 240-250 now!

dismissalText.commentary: Rohit Sharma retired hurt 19 (13b 2x4 1x6 29m) SR: 146.15

dismissalComment.html: back of a length on off. Skids off the surface and Rohit blocks it into the on side. And Rohit has pulled the plug on this innings for now. The movement is not good enough, he reckons, and Rohit is retiring hurt.

dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton c Kumar b Suyash Sharma 37 (22b 3x4 3x6 38m) SR: 168.18

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Rickelton falls! Seems like a googly, hung up full and wide. Rickelton has a wild mow across the line and the ball skews up off the top edge. Bhuvneshwar calls for it early, settles under it in the short third region and does the rest. Vital, vital wicket for RCB!

dismissalText.commentary: Tilak Varma c Duffy b Suyash Sharma 1 (3b 0x4 0x6 3m) SR: 33.33

dismissalComment.html: simple catch to short fine leg, and this chase is flagging now! Seems like another googly. On a length outside leg. Tilak looks to sweep but the ball bounces just enough to take the top edge. Spoons up to Duffy, and that is an incredibly soft dismissal. RCB tighten their grip further!

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav c Rasikh Salam b Pandya 33 (22b 5x4 0x6 38m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: swiped straight to deep backward square leg, and Krunal comes up with the breakthrough again! Tossed up on a length on leg. SKY looks for the sweep but the lack of pace means he has to generate all the power. Off the top edge and an easy catch for Rasikh on the fence!

dismissalText.commentary: Hardik Pandya c Shepherd b Duffy 40 (22b 6x4 1x6 38m) SR: 181.81
